recommendations.title: Soap and Water
recommendations.overview: A school janitor pretends to be a priest in order to give private lessons to a young top model.

recommendations.title: Honeymoon Trips
recommendations.overview: The vicissitudes of three couples of newlyweds from the celebration of weddings to their respective honeymoons.

recommendations.title: Compagni di scuola
recommendations.overview: A group of former high school classmates meets for a reunion 15 years after graduation, only to discover that any innocence or friendship is long lost.

recommendations.title: Grande, grosso e... Verdone
recommendations.overview: A comic movie divided in three episodes.

recommendations.title: Perdiamoci di vista
recommendations.overview: Comic tale of a cynical TV star's slow-combustion romance with a young paraplegic.

recommendations.title: Iris Blond
recommendations.overview: Romeo, a lovelorn Roman musician in his 40s with 20 years since his only hit, consults a fortuneteller who predicts he'll find love and money with a foreign singer named for a flower. In Brussels he meets Marguerite, an older chanteuse who interprets

recommendations.title: I due carabinieri
recommendations.overview: Two deadbeat friends barely pass the entrance exam for the Carabinieri, the national gendarmerie of Italy, but love for the same woman gets in the way.

recommendations.title: C'era un cinese in coma
recommendations.overview: A talent agent with a truly talentless client roster, Ercole Preziosi finds himself in trouble when a car crash injures his star comedian, so he turns to his young plucky driver to do stand-up duty.

recommendations.title: Ma che colpa abbiamo noi
recommendations.overview: Seven people in a therapy group are forced to find new ways of coping with their problems when their therapist dies in the middle of a session.

recommendations.title: Blessed Madness
recommendations.overview: A man dedicated to religion and very faithful husband suddenly finds himself single. The new shop assistant in his shop will overwhelm his life.
